commands.repair_reason: A narrow automated repair can extend the Gemini strip list and focused tests without needing the broader auth-contract or doctor-warning product work.; Needs attention: The patch improves child-process secret hygiene, but the incomplete Gemini scrub list leaves a concrete auth-boundary hardening gap.; Review finding: [P2] Include Gemini auth selectors in the child env scrub — extensions/acpx/src/codex-auth-bridge.ts... commands.review_summary:
The PR adds generated ACPX wrappers for built-in Claude and Gemini agents that strip selected provider API-key env vars from spawned child harnesses, plus tests and process tracking updates for the Gemini wrapper.

Reproducibility: no. runtime reproduction was run in this read-only review. Source inspection gives a high-confidence targeted path: launch the generated Gemini wrapper with GOOGLE_GENAI_USE_GCA or GOOGLE_GENAI_USE_VERTEXAI set and observe that the current PR would still pass those variables to the child.
commands.review_followup: A narrow automated repair can extend the Gemini strip list and focused tests without needing the broader auth-contract or doctor-warning product work.

target.title: fix(acpx): strip provider API keys from child harness env
target.author: anyech
